decisions.title_en: ChatGPT suffers global partial outage for 90+ minutes, Codex and image gen also affected
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback; event yesterday (1 day old). Downdetector spiked to 13k+ reports starting 10:05am ET; 63% reported issues accessing old conversations, 27% sign-in failures; OpenAI confirmed partial outage affecting 12 ChatGPT components and Codex.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI loses CPO Kevin Weil, Sora head Bill Peebles, enterprise CTO Narayanan in single-day triple exit
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback; 4 days old (within 5-day window). Kevin Weil (former CPO leading OpenAI for Science), Bill Peebles (Sora head), and Srinivas Narayanan (enterprise CTO) all announced exits same Friday; Sora web/app shuts down April 26, API Sept 24. Signals sharp consumer-to-enterprise pivot.

decisions.title_en: iQiyi goes all-in on AI content, debuts Nadou Pro suite in biggest overhaul since 2010 founding
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback; Bloomberg reported Monday April 20 that China's Netflix-like iQiyi expects AI to create the bulk of its shows in five years, launched Nadou Pro AI toolkit, and will restructure video app into social destination hosting AI-generated content. Nadou Pro soft-launched March 30 but April 20 is the strategic overhaul + public stakeout.

decisions.title_en: Bloomberg: China's cheap AI models create new tech stock winners, surpass US on OpenRouter for 5th week
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback; Bloomberg April 20 piece framed this as a stock-market winners story. Chinese AI token consumption on OpenRouter now 12.96T vs US 3.03T weekly (4x lead); top 6 most-used models globally are all Chinese (GLM/MiniMax/Kimi); DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.42/M tokens vs Claude Opus $75 (170x cheaper). Stanford AI Index from 04-13 covered a different angle (model quality parity).

decisions.title_en: Trump says 'Who?' when asked about Amodei's White House Mythos meeting
decisions.source: QuantoSei News / NYT DealBook press gaggle
decisions.reason: Previously published on 04-17 (White House opens Mythos to federal agencies; Amodei meets Wiles/Bessent/Cairncross) and 04-19 (NSA uses Mythos while Pentagon bans Anthropic). NEW development: when reporters asked Trump about the Amodei meeting that his own chief of staff hosted, he responded 'Who?' and 'no idea' — a public disavowal suggesting the federal Mythos access push is happening without presidential buy-in. Distinct political development, not a rehash.
